title: onosma urumensis
intro: Onosma urumensis, also known as Urum Onosma, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Onosma urumensis are often used in traditional medicine, typically in the form of infusions, decoctions, or dried extracts, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
